title: Main-Mediated MCP Research Lane — Context7/Exa/Codex for trusted Main; local-only children
approach: Main-mediated research. Trusted Main owns all external research; delegated children stay strictly local. Exact-version source disproved the original child-direct design: pi-mcp-adapter and pi-codex-search are package-discovered Pi extensions removed by --no-extensions (resource-loader.js:267-270,351-354), and Fabric passes --no-extensions for every extensions:false child (pi-fabric dist/worker.js:321-333), so adding MCP names to a child --tools allowlist only adds unknown names Pi ignores (agent-session.js:626-645). The committed A1/A2/B1 edits (commits 2c0dad9, 1a6b9c0, 7201882) are functionally no-ops and must be reworked. New design: Main calls only the exact retained Context7/Exa direct-tool names + codex_search, exposed via .pi/fabric.json capture.keepVisible (the exact-name mechanism that retains extension tools in Main's direct registry under fullCodeMode:true; pi-fabric docs/configuration.md:173-207, dist/capture/interceptor.js:97-110). Main sanitizes/bounds external content (<=8192-byte non-secret cited packet, treat as prompt-injection-capable untrusted data), then launches children with exactly tools:[read,grep,find,ls], extensions:false, recursive:false, worktree:false. Gather phases may fan out local children in parallel after Main gathers external evidence; supervisor handshake stays ONE local-only gather. Capability-aware fallback (Context7=docs, Exa=search/fetch, Codex=cited search; not interchangeable): ok/partial/local-only/blocked/rejected. Fabric approvals.write/execute/network stay deny; fullCodeMode:true and schema.mode:off unchanged. Direct retained tools bypass Fabric's captured-tool approval gate; network stays denied for fabric_exec. Exact direct MCP tool names are runtime-gated (server-prefixed per pi-mcp-adapter types.ts:431-437) and must be registry-proven by Task B before any config edit. pi-codex-search@0.1.5 declares peers ^0.79.10 which exclude Pi 0.81.1; codex compatibility is UNCERTAIN until a live gate proves it (scope shrinks to MCP-only otherwise, operator disposition). No generic mcp proxy exposed by default (it can connect/auth/discover arbitrary MCP servers; index.ts:254-271). ADR-013 records the design, exact-version evidence, and Main's direct-network trust boundary. Ships after proactive-supervisor (ADR-012) at HEAD a04a65c; ADR-013 next available. Rejected: child-direct Option A (invalidated by evidence); extensions:true Option B (fabric_exec blast radius, unproven allowlist-vs-fabric_exec filter on the agents.run child path); generic mcp proxy (broader than this feature).
blocks: proactive-supervisor (ADR-012) settled at HEAD a04a65c for shared files — SETTLED; ADR-012 present at DECISIONS.md:370
No capability widening: children stay extensions:false, recursive:false, worktree:false with tools:[read,grep,find,ls] only
No change to the supervisor actor config (extensions:false read-only posture preserved)
Main-mediated: external research is Main-direct; children never receive network/extension tools
Runtime-gated: exact direct MCP tool names and codex_search compatibility proven by Task B/C before any config/prompt edit downstream
Fabric posture preserved: fullCodeMode:true, schema.mode:off, approvals.write/execute/network:deny, subagents.extensions:false unchanged

manifests.baseline_note: STALE — do not diff verified files against a04a65c. .pi/fabric.json/.pi/settings.json carry legitimate concurrent model/compaction/executor changes and .pi/settings.json now pins pi-fabric 0.23.0. Capture a fresh feature-start fingerprint in Task B (HEAD, staged binary-diff digest, unstaged diff digest, untracked-file manifest) and compare feature-owned changes against that snapshot. Protected files (.pi/settings.json, verify.md, .opencode/command) must remain unchanged across the feature.

success_criteria.criterion: A: feature contract reconciled to Main-mediated — plan.md persisted, spec.md rewritten, prd.json graph/manifests/checks corrected; committed A1/A2/B1 marked rework_required, C1 partial; .pi/fabric.json added to write manifests; .pi/settings.json/.active/global-MCP/credentials removed from write ownership
success_criteria.verify: jq empty .opencode/artifacts/mcp-research-lane/prd.json && rg -nF 'Main-mediated' .opencode/artifacts/mcp-research-lane/spec.md .opencode/artifacts/mcp-research-lane/prd.json && test -f .opencode/artifacts/mcp-research-lane/plan.md && git diff --check

success_criteria.criterion: B/C: runtime gate passed — fresh fingerprint captured; Fabric capture catalog inspected; exact direct MCP tool names + codex_search registry-proven via Pi 0.81.1 SDK probe (getAllTools sourceInfo.path); no-extension child resolves exactly [read,grep,find,ls]; .pi/fabric.json capture.keepVisible added surgically (unrelated fields preserved); live benign smoke returns ok+citations; Fabric posture (fullCodeMode:true, schema.mode:off, approvals.write/execute/network:deny, subagents.extensions:false) unchanged
success_criteria.verify: jq -e '.fullCodeMode == true and .schema.mode == "off" and .approvals.write == "deny" and .approvals.execute == "deny" and .approvals.network == "deny" and .subagents.extensions == false and (.capture.keepVisible | index("fabric_exec"))' .pi/fabric.json && git diff --check

success_criteria.criterion: D/E/F: five lifecycle prompts corrected to Main-mediated — every research child dispatch has exactly tools:["read","grep","find","ls"], extensions:false, recursive:false, worktree:false; NO external name (resolve-library-id|query-docs|web_search_exa|web_fetch_exa|codex_search|mcp) appears in any child tools array; Main-direct acquisition + <=8192-byte packet + 5 status fallback documented; ADR-011 review-gate markers, ADR-012 handshake phases, <slug>, frontmatter, ship 'cannot declare', verify authority all preserved
success_criteria.verify: for f in supervise create plan research ship; do rg -nF 'tools:["read","grep","find","ls"]' ".pi/prompts/$f.md" || exit 1; done && ! rg -n 'tools:\s*:\s*\[[^]]*(resolve-library-id|query-docs|web_search_exa|web_fetch_exa|codex_search|mcp)' .pi/prompts/supervise.md .pi/prompts/create.md .pi/prompts/plan.md .pi/prompts/research.md .pi/prompts/ship.md && rg -nF 'proactive-supervisor/v1' .pi/prompts/supervise.md && rg -q 'cannot declare' .pi/prompts/ship.md && rg -q '<slug>' .pi/prompts/create.md && rg -q '<slug>' .pi/prompts/plan.md && git diff --check

success_criteria.criterion: G: cross-prompt behavioral regression — static scan clean; one live supervisor research-request exercised end-to-end (Main calls external, child receives only sanitized packet, child cannot resolve MCP/codex/bash/fabric_exec/recursion, supervisor receives bounded research-result); decision table reviewed for codex-fail/one-MCP-fail/all-external-fail/sensitive-reject/oversized

H/I: canonical authority + summaries — ADR-013 appended (context/decision/consequences/rejected/evidence/Main direct-network trust boundary); PLAN.md child-direct claims removed; AGENTS.md research paragraph states Main-mediated + children read/grep/find/ls only; tech-stack/roadmap/state synced; no claim of pi-codex-search@0.1.5 compatibility unless Task C proved it live
success_criteria.verify: rg -n '^## ADR-013' .pi/artifacts/pi-template/DECISIONS.md && ! rg -n 'children gain MCP|child-direct MCP|MCP-equipped parallel read-only' .pi/artifacts/pi-template/PLAN.md AGENTS.md && rg -nF 'Main-mediated' .pi/artifacts/pi-template/PLAN.md AGENTS.md .opencode/tech-stack.md .opencode/roadmap.md .opencode/state.md && rg -n 'extensions: false|extensions:false' AGENTS.md && git diff --check

success_criteria.criterion: J: final verification — L3 review dispositions complete; before/after fingerprint captured and equal; node>=24; pi-fabric 0.23.0; pi --approve --list-models resolves; slug in 5 prompts; forbidden-token clean across .pi/prompts/*.md; no external research tool names (Context7/Exa/codex/mcp) inside any child tools array; git diff --check clean; protected files (.pi/settings.json, verify.md, .opencode/command) unchanged across the feature; NO repository write after the final fingerprint
success_criteria.verify: node --version && node -p 'require("./.pi/npm/node_modules/pi-fabric/package.json").version' | rg -x '0\.23\.0' && pi --approve --list-models >/dev/null 2>&1 && for f in create plan ship verify research; do rg -q '<slug>' ".pi/prompts/$f.md" || exit 1; done && ! rg -n 'agent:|task\(|question\(|skill\(|write\(|\.active|spec\.md|prd\.json|review-state\.json' .pi/prompts/*.md && ! rg -n 'tools:\s*:\s*\[[^]]*(resolve-library-id|query-docs|web_search_exa|web_fetch_exa|codex_search|mcp)' .pi/prompts/*.md && git diff --check

tasks.title: RED capture + registry probe (runtime gate, read-only)
tasks.end_state: Fresh feature-start fingerprint captured (not a04a65c). Fabric capture catalog inspected for resolve-library-id/query-docs/web_search_exa/web_fetch_exa/codex_search; exact registered names + extension sources recorded (names may be server-prefixed). Pi 0.81.1 SDK probe via AgentSessionRuntime (explicit cwd/agentDir, SessionManager.inMemory, bindExtensions mode:print) asserts external tools NOT active under current capture defaults (RED) and a noExtensions:true child resolves exactly [read,grep,find,ls]. Provenance via getAllTools sourceInfo.path, not model self-report. runtime.dispose() in finally so session_shutdown cleans MCP processes.
tasks.checkpoint_reason: If exact direct MCP tools are absent, operator must enable only those tools interactively and restart Pi; do not expose the generic mcp proxy automatically.

tasks.title: GREEN Main visibility (.pi/fabric.json capture.keepVisible) + live smoke
tasks.end_state: .pi/fabric.json capture.keepVisible added surgically with fabric_exec + the proven exact direct MCP tool names + codex_search; every unrelated field (model, compaction, executor, subagents, mesh, memory) preserved. After trust/restart/reload, SDK probe GREEN (Main active registry contains exactly the retained external names; MCP sources resolve to pi-mcp-adapter; codex resolves to pi-codex-search; no-extension child still exactly local-only). Benign live smoke: Context7 resolve+query, Exa search+fetch, one codex_search — returns only status+citation URLs+failure classes, never raw results or repo data.
tasks.checkpoint_reason: Context7+Exa direct tools MUST register and be callable. If codex_search fails to register because pi-codex-search@0.1.5 declares incompatible ^0.79.10 peers, do NOT project-pin or force-install — stop for operator disposition: accept MCP-only scope or wait for a compatible upstream release. Requires /trust + restart + possible MCP direct-tool configuration.
tasks.verify: jq -e '.fullCodeMode == true and .schema.mode == "off" and .approvals.write == "deny" and .approvals.execute == "deny" and .approvals.network == "deny" and .subagents.extensions == false and (.capture.keepVisible | index("fabric_exec"))' .pi/fabric.json && git diff --check

Five failure statuses + capability-aware fallback defined. No external name in the research child's tools array.

Unrelated four-tool ADR-011 review dispatches NOT altered.
